articles.title: Starbucks CEO, international, sells $233,621 in company stock
articles.summary: Brady Brewer, CEO International at Starbucks Corp, sold 2,229 shares of company stock for $233,621 on May 5, 2026. This transaction occurred as Starbucks shares traded near their 52-week high and were up 24% year-to-date. In other news, Starbucks reported strong Q2 2026 financial results, exceeding market expectations for both EPS and revenue.

articles.title: Starbucks (SBUX) executive sells 2,229 shares in planned stock trade
articles.summary: Starbucks' CEO of International, Brady Brewer, sold 2,229 shares of SBUX common stock at an average price of $104.81 per share, totaling approximately $233,621. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. After the sale, Brewer directly holds 81,558.502 shares of Starbucks stock.
